name: Jam French Toast Triangles
recipeInstructions:
1. Evenly spread preserves on three bread slices.
2. Top with the remaining bread slices to make three sandwiches, pressing together to seal.
3. Cut each sandwich diagonally into half pieces.
4. In a shallow bowl, combine egg beaters and milk.
5. Dip each sandwich piece in the egg mixture to coat.
6. In a large skillet or griddle over medium-high heat, brown the sandwiches in margarine until golden brown on both sides.
7. Combine sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over the sandwiches before serving.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
NOTES: Serving size 1 piece; Calories 175 per piece; Fat 5 grams
Recipe By: Diet Delights, 1993
From: Ctlindab@usa.Nai.Net
